form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.30) at this track in a Class 5, finishing seventh and beaten 7 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and eight places from 16 starts. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (22.63) when second at Ascot Park in a Class 5. Has five successes and 11 minors from 23 starts from box 3. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 3 length third at this track but did record a handy 17.18 over the 295m journey. Heading in the right direction and well placed to be very competitive.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 295m at this track. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Looks close to another win after his success on March 5 at Cambridge Raceway over 457m. Last start was second over 295m in 16.94, behind Sugar Fix. Has clocked a scorching 16.65 here at this trip. Looks all set to find the winners' list.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked home bend unbalanced and lost ground, fell at lure.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 295m. Last start finished 5th on April 2 over 295m at this track behind Go Larry beaten 4.5 lengths (17.19) in a Class 5. Has run hot time here with a 16.72 PB at the distance. Pay to follow up.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 295m in 17.08 last start, beating Opawa Opie. Will be thereabouts.
